zh.lifeSummary: 當Eleanor Ann Wallis於1625年出生在美國新罕布夏州洛金哈姆也時，她的父親Thomas Wallis25歲，母親Margaret Hallibrowne25歲。她於1645年與George Wallis在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加劍橋大學默里 哈普爾結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她去世於1686年在美國新罕布夏州洛金哈姆波斯姆斯享年61歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Eleanor Ann Wallis于1625年出生在美国新罕布什尔州洛金哈姆也时，她的父亲Thomas Wallis25岁，母亲Margaret Hallibrowne25岁。她于1645年与George Wallis在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加劍橋大學默里 哈普爾结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和4个女儿的父母。她去世于1686年在美国新罕布什尔州洛金哈姆波斯姆斯享年61岁。

nameMeanings.name: Wallis
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish and English: from Anglo-Norman French Waleis, Walais ‘Welshman’, also sometimes ‘Breton’ (from Old English wēalas, walas, plural of walh, wealh, originally meaning a ‘Roman citizen’ and referring to the native British population, but in Old English this term later came to mean ‘serf, unfree person, foreigner’ or ‘Welshman’). In western and central England the medieval reference is clearly to Welshmen. In Norfolk and Lincolnshire, the reference was probably to Bretons, many of whom settled in the eastern counties after the Conquest. Compare Welsh , Walsh . The idea that the Scottish surname refers to the Welsh-speaking Britons of Strathclyde is erroneous.

variants.name: Wallace
meanings: Scottish and English: variant of   Wallis  , especially in Scotland, where the name was introduced from the Welsh Marches by a family of tenants of the Stewarts in the 12th century.
Americanized form of various like-sounding Jewish (Ashkenazic) surnames, e.g.   Wallach  .

variants.name: Wales
meanings: habitational name from Wales near Sheffield (South Yorkshire). The placename means ‘The Welshmen’ and denoted a settlement of Brittonic speakers living on the boundary between the Anglo-Saxon kingdoms of Northumbria and Mercia (from Old English wēalas, walas, plural of walh, wealh, originally meaning ‘Roman citizen’ and referring to the native British population, but in Old English this term later came to mean ‘serf, unfree person, foreigner’ or ‘Welshman’). See also Wallis .
habitational name from Wales, the country named from Old English wēalas ‘foreigners’ (especially those speaking Celtic or Romance languages). This meaning of the surname is quite rare.

variants.name: Welsh
meanings: Scottish, English, and Irish: ethnic name from Middle English welshe (Old English wēalisc, wēlisc) ‘foreign, Welsh’, for someone from Wales or a speaker of the Welsh language. Compare Walsh and Wallace .
Americanized form of Ukrainian and Jewish (from Ukraine) Voloshin or its Polish variant Wołoszyn (see Woloszyn ).

nameMeanings.name: Eleanor
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French respelling of the Old Provençal name Alienor. This has sometimes been taken as a derivative of Helen , but it is more probably of Germanic derivation (the first element being ali ‘other, foreign’ the second is obscure). The name was introduced to England by Eleanor of Aquitaine ( 1122–1204 ), who came from Aquitaine in south-west France to be the wife of King Henry II . It was also borne by Eleanor of Provence, the wife of Henry III , and Eleanor of Castile, wife of Edward I .

variants.name: Ellenor
meanings: Variant spelling of   Eleanor  , the result of blending with   Ellen .

variants.name: Elenor
meanings: From an Old French respelling of the Old Provençal name Alienor. This has sometimes been taken as a derivative of Helen , but it is more probably of Germanic derivation (the first element being ali ‘other, foreign’ the second is obscure). The name was introduced to England by Eleanor of Aquitaine ( 1122–1204 ), who came from Aquitaine in south-west France to be the wife of King Henry II . It was also borne by Eleanor of Provence, the wife of Henry III , and Eleanor of Castile, wife of Edward I .

nameMeanings.name: Ann
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Variant spelling of Anne . In the U.S. Ann is the more frequent spelling.

en.lifeSummary: When Eleanor Ann Wallis was born in 1625, in Rye, Rockingham, New Hampshire, United States, her father, Thomas Wallis, was 25 and her mother, Margaret Hallibrowne, was 25. She married George Wallis in 1645, in New Hampshire, British Colonial America. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 4 daughters. She died in 1686, in Portsmouth, Rockingham, New Hampshire, United States, at the age of 61.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Eleanor Ann Wallis est née en 1625, à Rye, Rockingham, New Hampshire, États-Unis, son père, Thomas Wallis, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Margaret Hallibrowne, avait 25 ans. Elle a épousé George Wallis en 1645, à New Hampshire, Amérique coloniale britannique. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 4 filles. Elle est décédée en 1686, à Portsmouth, Rockingham, New Hampshire, États-Unis, à l’âge de 61 ans.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Eleanor Ann Wallis è nata il nel 1625 nel Rye, Rockingham, New Hampshire, Stati Uniti d'America, sua padre, Thomas Wallis, aveva 25 anni e sua madre, Margaret Hallibrowne, aveva 25 anni. Lei sposato George Wallis nel 1645, nel New Hampshire, British Colonial America. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 4 figlie. Morì nel 1686, nel Portsmouth, Rockingham, New Hampshire, Stati Uniti d'America, all'età di 61 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Eleanor Ann Wallisが1625年にアメリカ合衆国ニューハンプシャー州ロクインガムリで生まれた時，父Thomas Wallisは25歳，母Margaret Hallibrowneは25歳であった。1645年にイギリス植民地アメリカニュー ハンプシュアイアでGeorge Wallisと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼女は1686年にアメリカ合衆国ニューハンプシャー州ロクインガムポルトスモウスで61歳で死去した。

ko.Casco, Cumberland, Massachusetts Bay Col: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 c벌랜드 카스코
ko.Rye, Rockingham, New Hampshire, British: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 뉴 함프실르 록잉함 리
ko.Rye Beach, Rye, Rockingham, New Hampshir: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 뉴 함프실르 록잉함 리 리 비치
ko.Portsmouth, Rockingham, New Hampshire, B: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 뉴 함프실르 록잉함 포츠모우스
ko.lifeSummary: Eleanor Ann Wallis(이)가 1625년 미국 뉴햄프셔 주 록잉함 리에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Thomas Wallis(은)는 25세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Margaret Hallibrowne(은)는 25세였다. 그녀는 1645년 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 뉴 함프실르에서 George Wallis(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1686년 미국 뉴햄프셔 주 록잉함 포츠모우스에서 61세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Eleanor Ann Wallis nasceu em 1625, em Rye, Rockingham, Nova Hampshire, Estados Unidos da América, seu pai, Thomas Wallis, tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Margaret Hallibrowne, tinha 25 anos. Ela casou-se com George Wallis em 1645, em New Hampshire, British Colonial America. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 4 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1686, em Portsmouth, Rockingham, Nova Hampshire, Estados Unidos da América, com 61 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Eleanor Ann Wallis родилась в 1625 г. в местности ри, роккингхам, Нью-Гэмпшир, Соединенные штаты, её отцу по имени Thomas Wallis было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret Hallibrowne, 25. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени George Wallis в 1645 г. в местности ню хампшир, бритиш колоняль амирика. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 4 дочери. Она умерла в 1686 г. в местности порцмоут, роккингхам, Нью-Гэмпшир, Соединенные штаты в возрасте 61 год.

Se casó con George Wallis en 1645, en New Hampshire, British Colonial America. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió en 1686, en Portsmouth, Rockingham, Nuevo Hampshire, Estados Unidos, a la edad de 61 años.
